data.description:
## Why

The completion verifier (`src/rebar/llm/completion.py`, 295 LOC) is a direct single-agent call
with a deterministic child-closure/signature precheck, reconciliation, and signing â€” also OFF
the workflow engine. It is the SIMPLER of the two gate migrations (the walking skeleton): it
needs NO new constructs, only existing step kinds. Migrating it first derisks the workflow-as-gate
approach before the larger plan-review migration (B2).

## What

Author a v3 engine workflow (e.g. `.rebar/workflows/completion-verification.yaml`) expressing the
verifier as `uses` (deterministic child-closure + signature precheck â€” fail-closed, no LLM) â†’
`prompt` (the agentic `completion-verifier` reviewer, ONE tool-using call, emits
`completion_verdict`) â†’ `uses` (reconcile/normalize: FAILâ‡”findings invariant + citation
downgrade) â†’ `uses` (sign the verdict). Each deterministic stage wraps the existing `completion.py`
helpers as `uses` ops; the agent stage references the existing `completion-verifier` prompt +
`completion_verdict` output schema.

## Scope

- The `completion-verification` workflow YAML + the `uses` ops wrapping the precheck / reconcile /
  sign helpers (extracted from `completion.py` without changing their logic).
- Reference the existing `completion-verifier` prompt + `completion_verdict` schema.
- Runs end-to-end OFFLINE (FakeAgentRunner) producing a completion_verdict; live cutover is B5.
- Independent of B1/B2 (no batch/overlay constructs needed).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A v3 `completion-verification` engine workflow expresses precheck (`uses`) â†’ agentic verify
      (`prompt`, one call) â†’ reconcile (`uses`) â†’ sign (`uses`), using existing step kinds only.
- [ ] The deterministic stages wrap the existing `completion.py` helpers (child-closure+signature
      precheck, FAILâ‡”findings reconciliation, citation downgrade, signing) without behavioural change.
- [ ] The workflow validates + lints clean and runs end-to-end OFFLINE (FakeAgentRunner) producing
      a completion_verdict-shaped result; a test exercises it.
- [ ] `make lint` + the full test suite pass.
data.title: B3: completion-verifier as an engine workflow (uses -> prompt -> uses -> uses)
